service.name: Netlify API
service.description_for_ai: Jamstack hosting platform. Deploy static sites, Next.js, Gatsby. Edge functions, serverless, forms, auth, split testing. Free tier very generous. Used by 3M+ developers. Use for frontend deployment, static hosting.

auth.how_to_get: User Settings → Applications → New access token

capabilities.description_for_ai: List all Netlify sites in account with deploy status and URLs.
Trigger a new deploy build for an existing Netlify site. Rebuilds from the connected git repository.

agent_hints.auth: Create personal access token at app.netlify.com/user/applications/personal. Bearer token in header.
agent_hints.site_id: Get site ID from site settings or from list_sites response id field.
agent_hints.deploy_hooks: Set up deploy hooks in UI for triggering builds from external systems (webhooks).
agent_hints.env_vars: Manage environment variables via PATCH /api/v1/sites/{site_id} with build_settings.env object.
